pi_items.source: Bank name verified via web search - actual legal entity name is JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., but Chase Bank NA is commonly used shorthand.
ABA routing number verified via Remitly and bank.codes. This is the primary routing number for JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
SWIFT/BIC code verified via Wise, bank.codes, and theswiftcodes.com. CHASUS33 is the official SWIFT code for JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. in New York, NY.
Headquarters address verified via multiple sources (Fox Business, Wikipedia, JPMorgan Chase official). The registered address is 270 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10017.

This is a synthetic test account number (not a real account). Verified by code analysis - the export_result.sh script queries the database for this specific test account created during task execution.
This is a synthetic test account name created for this task. Verified by code analysis - the export_result.sh script queries the database for accounts with this name.
Verified via verifier.py documentation (line 24) and export_result.sh. In iDempiere, 'C' represents Checking account type.
USD is the ISO 4217 currency code for United States Dollar, a real currency. Verified by code analysis - export_result.sh queries currency_iso field from C_Currency table.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates banking records in iDempiere using real Chase Bank (JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.) details: routing number 021000021, SWIFT code CHASUS33, and headquarters address at 270 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10017. The specific account details (account number 8877665544, name 'Chase Payroll Operating', type Checking, currency USD) are synthetic test data. All metadata values are verified as correct.
